ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the trade date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the trade date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the trade date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the trade date */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of shares traded on the trade date */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend paid on the trade date */,
  "in_sp500" INTEGER /* Indicates if the stock is part of the S&P 500 index */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company (e.g., Technology, Financial Services) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering (IPO) date of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_industry FOREIGN KEY ("industry") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("exchange") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange (e.g., New York, USA) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Technology, Financial Services) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the industry belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., Finance, IT) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the metric is calculated for */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial metric (e.g., P/E Ratio, Earnings Growth) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the financial metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was calculated */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the financial metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert is related to */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price drop, high volume) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data record */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the external data (e.g., GDP, unemployment rate, news) */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the external data */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the external data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the external data (e.g., Bureau of Labor Statistics, Reuters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market event */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the event is related to */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the market event (e.g., merger, earnings announcement) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the market event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_events_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external data record */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator (e.g., GDP, inflation rate) */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "indicator_date" TEXT /* Date of the economic indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES external_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_feeds" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external data record */,
  "news_title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "news_content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_feeds_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES external_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock split record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "split_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock split */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of the stock split (e.g., 2:1, 3:2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_splits_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "dividend_date" TEXT /* Date of the dividend payment */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend payment */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "payout_ratio" REAL /* Payout ratio of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst rating record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date of the analyst rating */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the analyst (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation given by the analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutional_holders" (
  "holder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institutional holder record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "holder_name" TEXT /* Name of the institutional holder */,
  "shares_held" INTEGER /* Number of shares held by the institutional holder */,
  "percentage_held" REAL /* Percentage of shares held by the institutional holder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institutional_holders_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
